prestazioni: Swap the factory 318ci (5.2L) LA-series V8 (engine code: A318) for a fully built 440ci (7.2L) RB-series big-block (engine code: RB440) using a Mopar Performance 440 stroker kit (forged crank, H-beam rods, forged pistons) with a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H camshaft (248°/254° duration, 0.544" lift) and port-matched Edelbrock Performer RPM cylinder heads (2.14" intake, 1.81" exhaust valves) for 550+ HP on 93 octane.

Install a Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle-body injection system with a FAST XFI Sportsman ECU and dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, paired with a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust featuring Flowmaster Super 44 mufflers and 2.5" mandrel-bent piping with a X-pipe crossover for optimized scavenging.

Upgrade the 727 TorqueFlite transmission with a TCI StreetFighter torque converter (3,500 stall), a B&M Shift Improver Kit, and a Derale transmission cooler with a Hayden 10" electric fan for sustained drag strip use, while reinforcing the 8.75" rear end with a Moser Engineering 31-spline axle kit and a Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential.
estetica: Apply a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with a satin black roof and hood stripes, paired with a Restomod Air Ride Technologies front clip (replacing the stock bumper with a smoothed, body-color valence) and a custom-fabricated steel rear diffuser with integrated LED brake light bar.

Install a set of 18x9.5" and 18x11" Billet Specialties Vintec wheels (ET +12/+25) with Nitto NT05R 275/35R18 and 315/30R18 tires, complemented by Baer 6P disc brake calipers (13" rotors) up front and Wilwood Dynalite II calipers (12" rotors) in the rear, with stainless steel braided lines.

Replace the factory interior with a TMI Products custom vinyl upholstery kit (black with green stitching), a Grant GT steering wheel on a Flaming River tilt column, and a full Autometer Phantom gauge cluster (boost, AFR, oil pressure, water temp) mounted in a custom aluminum dash overlay, while adding a Sparco Pro 2000 racing seat with a Schroth 4-point harness.
